title: Template Mapping Configuration Schema
description: Schema for mapping GitHub Issue Template names to execution commands in GitHub Issue Adapter

template_mapping.description: Mapping from Issue Template names to default execution commands

additionalProperties.description: Command to execute when Issue uses this template

explicit_label_priority.description: Whether explicit command: labels take priority over template mapping

template_fallback.description: Whether to use template mapping as fallback when no explicit command

default_command.description: Default command when neither label nor template provides a command

inference_rules.description: Rules for inferring template type from Issue content

infer_from_body_structure.description: Whether to infer template from Issue body structure patterns

infer_from_labels.description: Whether to infer template from Issue label patterns

label_pattern_mapping.description: Mapping from label patterns to inferred templates

additionalProperties.description: Template name inferred from this label pattern
